criteria.name: static_docs_scaffold_and_compose
evidence: docs\LOCAL_DEVELOPMENT.md length=3517 and docs\CODEX_ENVIRONMENT.md length=2709; both document check-env, bootstrap-dev, test/check, stack-up, stack-smoke, and stack-down commands.

.env.example length=745; it contains local-development placeholders/defaults only (POSTGRES_USER=atlas, POSTGRES_PASSWORD=atlas, POSTGRES_DB=atlas, DATABASE_URL=postgresql+psycopg://atlas:atlas@postgres:5432/atlas) with comments stating these are NON-SECRET local development defaults and not production credentials.
apps\api\app\main.py length=2206, apps\api\Dockerfile length=956, alembic.ini length=798, migrations\versions\0001_scaffold_baseline.py length=1396, docker-compose.yml length=2245.
docker compose config --services returned exactly: postgres, api.
apps\web exists=False, apps\worker exists=False, apps\scheduler exists=False; docker-compose.yml has web/worker/scheduler only in a commented deferred block.

criteria.name: check_env_runtime_detection
evidence: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\check-env.ps1 from repo root exited 0 and printed Docker 29.1.4-rd, Node.js v24.11.0, npm 11.6.1, Python 3.13.14, Docker daemon reachable, and ENVIRONMENT CHECK PASSED.
Invoking the script by absolute path from C:\ exited 0 and still printed Repository root: C:\Users\sergiyt\.copilot\repos\copilot-worktrees\freetier-atlas\stsyg-glowing-broccoli.
Simulated missing runtime with empty PATH exited 1 and printed actionable messages for Docker, Node.js, npm, and Python, ending ENVIRONMENT CHECK FAILED: missing Docker, Node.js, npm, Python.
Static inspection: scripts\check-env.ps1 sets $RepoRoot = Split-Path -Parent $PSScriptRoot and Set-Location $RepoRoot.

criteria.name: bootstrap_and_test_regression
evidence: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\bootstrap-dev.ps1 exited 0; it reused .venv, installed the Python project editable with dev/runtime dependencies, ran npm install, and ended BOOTSTRAP COMPLETE.
Static inspection of scripts\bootstrap-dev.ps1 shows it creates .venv when .venv\Scripts\python.exe is absent, runs pip install -e .[dev], and runs npm install.
pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\test.ps1 exited 0; pytest collected 27 items and reported 25 passed, 2 skipped, TESTS PASSED.
pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\check.ps1 -NodeAudit exited 0 and ended ALL CHECKS PASSED.

check.ps1 reported PASS for Ruff lint, Ruff format check, Pytest, Prettier check, ESLint, Secret scan, Python dependency audit, and Node dependency audit; pytest reported 25 passed, 2 skipped; pip-audit reported no known vulnerabilities; npm audit found 0 vulnerabilities.

criteria.name: live_stack_smoke_and_database
evidence: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\stack-up.ps1 exited 0; docker compose built the API image, started postgres and api, postgres became Healthy, and the script ended STACK UP: API is live at http://localhost:8000/health.
pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\stack-smoke.ps1 exited 0 and ended STACK SMOKE PASSED after PASS results for API liveness, API readiness, and Migration applied.
Independent GET /health returned status 200 body {"status":"ok","service":"FreeTier Atlas API","version":"0.1.0.dev0","environment":"development"}.
Independent GET /health/ready returned status 200 body {"status":"ready","checks":{"database":"ok"}}.
docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U atlas -d atlas -c "select * from app_meta;" returned one row: scaffold_initialized | true | 2026-07-15 20:00:57.869586+00.

criteria.name: negative_readiness_when_database_down
evidence: docker compose stop postgres exited 0.
While postgres was stopped, GET /health returned status 200 body {"status":"ok","service":"FreeTier Atlas API","version":"0.1.0.dev0","environment":"development"}.

While postgres was stopped, GET /health/ready with -SkipHttpErrorCheck returned status 503 body {"status":"not_ready","checks":{"database":"unreachable"},"detail":"Database connectivity check failed; the API is not ready."}.
Leak probe against the 503 body for atlas, postgresql+psycopg://, or :// returned leak_detected=False.
docker compose start postgres exited 0, and readiness recovered to status 200 body {"status":"ready","checks":{"database":"ok"}}.

criteria.name: persistence_and_idempotency_after_restart
evidence: docker compose down without --volumes exited 0, then pwsh -File scripts\stack-up.ps1 exited 0 and pwsh -File scripts\stack-smoke.ps1 exited 0 with STACK SMOKE PASSED.
After restart with the named volume kept, SELECT count(*) FROM app_meta WHERE key='scaffold_initialized' AND value='true' returned 1.

After restart, docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U atlas -d atlas -c "select * from app_meta;" returned exactly one marker row with updated_at 2026-07-15 20:00:57.869586+00, proving data was retained and not duplicated.
docker compose exec -T api alembic current returned 0001_scaffold_baseline (head).

criteria.name: live_integration_tests
evidence: With ATLAS_STACK_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000, .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests\integration -m integration -v exited 0.
Integration pytest collected 2 items and passed tests/integration/test_stack_health.py::test_live_health_ok and ::test_live_readiness_ok (2 passed in 2.33s).

criteria.name: secrets_and_configuration_safety
evidence: scripts\check.ps1 -NodeAudit reported PASS: Secret scan.
Independent secret scan command $files=git ls-files -co --exclude-standard; .\.venv\Scripts\detect-secrets-hook.exe --baseline .secrets.baseline @($files) exited 0.

Static inspection of .env.example, apps\api\app\settings.py, and docker-compose.yml found only documented non-secret local defaults using atlas/atlas and comments warning they must not be used in production; no real credential material was found.
The 503 readiness response did not include the atlas placeholder password or any connection string.

criteria.name: scope_discipline_and_no_unsupported_free_claims
evidence: git --no-pager diff main...HEAD --stat reported 36 files changed, 1563 insertions(+), 56 deletions(-), limited to .env.example, agent-state contract/progress, API scaffold, Alembic/migrations, docker-compose, dev docs, scripts, pyproject, and tests.
Changed-file out-of-scope path probe found no apps/web, apps/worker, apps/scheduler, frontend, domain, catalogue, classification, provider, offer, or quota implementation paths.
docker compose config --services returned only postgres and api.

Diff search for free/Z0/zero-cost found only scoping statements such as 'no hosting, paid dependency, or free-tier/Z0 claim is introduced' and deferred Z0 classification references; no unsupported service-free or Z0 claim was introduced.

criteria.name: empty_database_migration_sanity
evidence: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\stack-down.ps1 -Volumes exited 0 and removed Volume stsyg-glowing-broccoli_atlas_pgdata.
From the empty database volume, pwsh -File scripts\stack-up.ps1 exited 0 and pwsh -File scripts\stack-smoke.ps1 exited 0 with STACK SMOKE PASSED.
Fresh-volume SELECT count(*) FROM app_meta WHERE key='scaffold_initialized' AND value='true' returned 1; select * from app_meta returned scaffold_initialized | true | 2026-07-15 20:19:50.999281+00.
Fresh-volume docker compose exec -T api alembic current returned 0001_scaffold_baseline (head).
Final cleanup ran pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\stack-down.ps1; it exited 0 and docker compose ps --format json returned no services.

commands_run: read agent-state\current_contract.json, docs\CODEX_AUTONOMY_POLICY.md, docs\AGENT_HARNESS.md, agent-state\feature_list.json, agent-state\evaluation.json, CODEX_TASKS.md, docs\ARCHITECTURE.md
nested pwsh with empty PATH: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File <repo>\scripts\check-env.ps1
docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U atlas -d atlas -c "select * from app_meta;"
Invoke-WebRequest -SkipHttpErrorCheck http://localhost:8000/health and http://localhost:8000/health/ready with postgres stopped
docker compose start postgres and poll http://localhost:8000/health/ready
pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\stack-up.ps1 after compose down
pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\stack-smoke.ps1 after compose down
docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U atlas -d atlas -tAc "select count(*) from app_meta where key='scaffold_initialized' and value='true';"
docker compose exec -T api alembic current
static out-of-scope path probe over changed files
pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\stack-up.ps1 from empty database volume
pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\stack-smoke.ps1 from empty database volume
docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U atlas -d atlas -tAc "select count(*) from app_meta where key='scaffold_initialized' and value='true';" from empty database volume
docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U atlas -d atlas -c "select * from app_meta;" from empty database volume
docker compose exec -T api alembic current from empty database volume
end_to_end_steps_run: Read the contract, feature ledger, previous evaluation, autonomy and harness rules, task 002 context, architecture, decision register, and ADR 0004 before grading.
Verified check-env from repo root, from C:\ by absolute path, and by simulated missing PATH failure.
Ran bootstrap-dev, test.ps1, and the full check.ps1 -NodeAudit regression suite.
Started the Docker Compose stack through scripts\stack-up.ps1 and smoked it through scripts\stack-smoke.ps1.
Independently probed /health, /health/ready, docker compose services, and app_meta via psql.
Stopped PostgreSQL and verified readiness failed closed with a credential-free 503 while liveness stayed 200; restarted PostgreSQL and verified readiness recovery.
Ran live integration pytest against http://localhost:8000.
Ran docker compose down without volumes, restarted, confirmed smoke, exactly one marker row, and Alembic at head.
Reviewed diff scope and service scope for absence of worker, scheduler, frontend, domain model, and unsupported free/Z0 claims.
Dropped the named database volume, restarted from empty database, confirmed migrations and smoke pass, then left the stack down.
notes: Evaluation was performed against HEAD commit a09a5c3c12d23c11e08c0a082daa93a34786e0a4 on branch stsyg-glowing-broccoli.
F002 remains an epic and must stay passes=false; this verdict covers only slice-1-dev-env-and-minimal-vertical.
The atlas/atlas strings are documented local-development placeholders/defaults, not production secrets. They are allowlisted for scanners and were not leaked by the failure response.
The final cleanup left the Docker Compose stack down; docker compose ps --format json returned no services.
recommendations: Commit these evaluator-state updates and proceed with PR review for the F002 slice-1 branch.
Do not mark F002 passes=true until the full F002 epic (including frontend, worker, scheduler, restart, and cleanup workflows) receives Level 2 evaluation.
Before slice 2, get the owner checkpoint required by the slice-1 contract for worker, scheduler, and frontend scope.
